title: The Cannon Threatens the Town
description: On pages 18–21, this part develops the danger of Buggy’s crew and the unstable alliance between Luffy, Zoro, and Nami.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: REALLY!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YEAH! And you could be OUR NAVI- GATOR!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WILL YOU JOIN MY PIRATE CREW!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HMPH...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I DIDN'T KNOW THAT YOU WERE A PIRATE!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: FORGET EVERY- THING I SAID! I'D NEVER TEAM UP WITH YOU!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I GET IT... YOU'RE AFTER SOME FANTASTIC TREASURE AND YOU KEEP THE MAP IN THAT HAT OF YOURS.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TOLD YOU, THERE'S NO MAP IN MY HAT!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: THEN WHY IS THAT RAGGEDY OLD HAT SO PRECIOUS TO YOU, LIAR?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TREASURE THIS HAT BECAUSE A FRIEND GAVE IT TO ME A LONG TIME AGO.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THAT'S WHEN I SWORE I'D GATHER A CREW AND BECOME A PIRATE.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmph! Pirates, Phooey!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: These are crazy times.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If there's one thing in this world I really hate...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...It's Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But I love money! And TANGERINGS!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This guy's a stupid, worthless plunderer...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He doesn't seem to have anything worth stealing... but maybe he could still be of use to me...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: SO HOW 'BOUT IT? WANNA BE MY NAVIGATOR?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I told you to forget about it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: NO-GOOD PIRATE!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I got it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BUT YOU SEEM TO REALLY NEED A NAVIGATOR, SO I'LL CONSIDER IT ON ONE CONDITION.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: REALLY? WHAT'S YOUR CONDITION?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just a little thing. It's nothing, really.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Go with me to see buggy.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You got it! Let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHERE IS THIS BUGGY?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hold on, I HAVE TO GET READY.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's that rope for?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh, I always carry a rope.

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
